description_long: This is a full-body figure of an adult woman with a medium to heavy build, standing with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. She has long, wavy hair that falls past her shoulders and is dressed in a sleeveless crop top and short shorts, revealing her midriff and legs. The figure wears low-top sneakers and has a relaxed, natural stance. The clothing fits snugly, with visible seams and details such as pockets and waistband on the shorts. The facial features are softly modeled, and the hands are open with fingers extended. The overall appearance suggests a casual, everyday urban pedestrian.
description: A casually dressed adult woman with long wavy hair, wearing a sleeveless crop top, shorts, and sneakers, standing in a T-pose.
description_view_0: Front view showing facial features, crop top, shorts, and sneakers with arms extended.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the body, arm, and leg contours.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, crop top, shorts, and both arms extended.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the body profile and the side of the face, arm, and leg.
attribute_clothing_type: casual sleeveless crop top and short shorts
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
